runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on March 31 over 340m at Bulli behind Towering Luke beaten 11 lengths (20.12) in a Grade 5. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (23.20) over 401m at this track. Aided by a low draw and is in the mix.

runners.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 8 length fourth over 320m at this track. Can't recommend in this field.

runners.formComment: Solid performance to win by 5.5 lengths at this track over 320m (18.27) beating Dark Money in Maiden on April 8. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

runners.formComment: Impressive performance on debut, to score by 2.5 lengths in a Maiden last start at this track, clocking a solid 18.20 over the 320m trip. In form and looks tough to beat again.
